text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears that Sakura Bakushin O is absent with
stomach pain. She said she would be better in no
time, but I wonder if she's okay...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it is because I'm thinking about her, but I
get the feeling Sakura Bakushin O is about to
appear in front of me...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Bakushin O! Why are you here?
Bakushin O! Why are you here?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? Isn't it obvious? My stomach
ache subsided so I came to school!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It'd be terrible if the class representative didn't
attend... Owww.
choice_data_list: As I thought, you haven't recovered yet.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm just hungry, that's all! It's definitely not a
stomachache!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She clearly hasn't recovered.
choice_data_list: You've got to go back to your dorm.
You've got to go back to your dorm.
You know it's wrong to worry everyone like this.
You know it's wrong to worry everyone like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She clearly hasn't recovered.
choice_data_list: You've got to go back to your dorm.
You've got to go back to your dorm.
You know it's wrong to worry everyone like this.
You know it's wrong to worry everyone like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I tell her to rest up, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I refuse! Everyone in class is waiting for me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Say what you like, but I'm going to class!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKU... SHIIIN! Owww...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Clutching the side of her stomach, Sakura
Bakushin O dashes off to her homeroom.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's just about to reach for the classroom door
as I catch up to her.
choice_data_list: Stop! Go back to your dorm!
Stop! Go back to your dorm!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I refuse! As the class representative, I have duties
to attend to!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
That was great! You did so good as substitute
class representative!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Voices coming from the classroom cause Sakura
Bakushin O to stop in her tracks.

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text: Did I really?

text_block_list.name: Classmate C
text_block_list.text: For real, for real! You were the perfect class rep!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text: Come on, you're flattering me too much!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
"The perfect... class rep"? Does that mean I'm no
longer needed?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps due to her sickness, Sakura Bakushin O's
voice sounds almost timid. The students' words
must've added insult to injury.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...
choice_data_list: I'm sure it's not like that. Just keep listening.
I'm sure it's not like that. Just keep listening.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: But... it does feel lonely without Baku, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Classmate C
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's so quiet without her shouting
BAKUSHIN!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
It's hard work being a representative. Baku is
amazing, being able to work like that every day...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: E-everyone!
choice_data_list: See! I told you!
See! I told you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! It seems I'm still needed as class
representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Everyone... Don't worry, I will continue on in my
role!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hurriedly stop the extremely emotional Sakura
Bakushin O from rushing into the classroom.
Instead, I make her return to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Tracen Academy sees the return
of the energetic class representative as she goes
about her duties.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she pushes herself now, her symptoms may
worsen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I advise her that it isn't wise for a class
representative to make everyone worry...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Nngh... I suppose you're right!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My actions this time weren't becoming of a model
class representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'll head back to the dorm for... now... Urgh!
choice_data_list: Let's take a break in the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Y-yes. Sorry...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O's sickness seems to be rearing
its ugly head again, so I take her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Awww... I hope everyone in class is okay.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't forgive myself if something happened
because of my absence...
choice_data_list: Just focus on your recovery for now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's fine and all, but as class representative, I
can't help but worry about the class.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: If... I'm not there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The bed-ridden Sakura Bakushin O finally falls
asleep, but she continues to fret about her
classmates up to the moment she drifts off.
choice_data_list: ...I'll go check on her class instead.
...I'll go check on her class instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I quietly exit the infirmary, being careful not to
wake Sakura Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ungh...

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you awake, Baku?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why are you all here?

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text: Your trainer told us that you came to school.

text_block_list.name: Classmate C
text_block_list.text:
Here! Some tea to help you get back on your feet!
Get well soon, okay?

text_block_list.name: Classmate D
text_block_list.text:
It's no fun when Baku isn't here! We need our class
representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you so much! I'll have to recover from
this stomachache as soon as possible!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Let's go, Trainer! Let's train this pesky
stomach pain away!
choice_data_list: What?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Intense training offsets intense pain... right?
choice_data_list: No, it doesn't!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, her classmates and I have to stop
Sakura Bakushin O from getting up and running
out.
